---
title: "Prerequisite Setup"
---

In the analyses, `Momocs` and `tools` packages are used.
Make sure to install these packages before running the notebooks.

```{r}
# latest Momocs was archived, so install the archived version
renv::install("Momocs@1.5.0")
renv::install("tools")
```

If you execue `renv::restore()` as described in the index.qmd, these packages will be automatically installed.
